memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:52:60.snippet: ## Watchdog Alert Context Lothar received "Felix Watchdog: Gateway is DOWN" message — NOT from Felix. Source unclear (external monitoring?). Gateway was UP when checked. No action needed. ### REEL 90-Day Blocking Fix (13:29) - `nylongerie-create-reel-batch.js`: Added same 90-day same-account blocking logic that posts have - Previously: `!used[e.file]` blocked reel forever if in used-images.json (no expiry) - Now: checks `entry.type === 'reel'` + `entry.used_date` + 90-day expiry, routes to account - `blockedReels[file]` built at selection time, applied in filter - Syntax verified ✅
